hooks.command: cd "D:/dev/site-share-app" && git pull --rebase --autostash origin master >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
cd "D:/dev/site-share-app" && git add -A && (git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "auto: $(date +%Y-%m-%d\ %H:%M:%S)" >/dev/null 2>&1) && git push origin master >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
